content: في نَفس الوقت اللي طِفل بيِتولَد في شَخص بيِموت

transcriptions.arabizi: fi nafs ilwa't il-li tiflabiyitwilid fi shachsabiyimoot

relationships: eng:At the same time as a child is born, somebody is dying
